'''Dael Levare''' was a member of one of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] richest families during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He played [[Net-ball]], and was once engaged to [[Bria Tharen]]. Tharen's [[Sera Tharen|mother]] had been pushing them together for years, but Bria broke up with Dael when she found out he was cheating on her. Their [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] was called off, much to Sera Tharen's disgust.

Later, when Bria returned to Corellia with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Levare recognized Han and called him Tallus Bryne, an alias Solo had once used while involved in a con, forcing the couple to leave Corellia. Levare had also watched Han win the Corellian swoop championship and was a big fan. At this time Dael Levare was in a new relationship with [[Sulen Belos]].
